---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new component, token, or theme
labels: enhancement
---

**Check [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) first** — is this already listed under "Under consideration"
or "Not planned"?

**What are you trying to build?**
The real use case, not just the component name — helps judge fit against Corpo's calm,
light-first, business-UI brief.

**Proposed API (optional)**
Rough props/variants if you have a shape in mind.

**Alternatives considered**
Can an existing component (composed differently) already cover this?
